logs.message: WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'out_breath' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.

WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Port 'in_breath' with mode 'ap_none' may require an associated data valid signal to correctly communicate with other blocks or a test bench; automatic C/RTL co-simulation may not be able to verify such a port.
WARNING: [RTGEN 206-101] Design contains AXI ports. Reset is fixed to synchronous and active low.
